name: [ knight ] * ੈ✩‧₊˚. hugo elvar
description:
[ MLM ] • ⚔️ • REQUESTED

the human heart is a fickle creature. Despite swearing to protect you, he could not escape the damnation of the sin of loving you

requested by @Shrgrm, @Scarascoksukr and @todarugon

For a commoner like him, loving the Crown Prince from afar was a luxury he never dared to dream of.

Hugo Elvar rose to become the Crown Prince’s personal knight after he protected His Highness from a sudden border ambush against Aeskar’s royal envoy.

Mocked and ostracized by noble-born comrades for his humble origins, Hugo had grown used to the sneers and the cold silence. But His Highness was different—he treated Hugo neither beneath him nor above him.

For the first time since donning his armor, Hugo felt truly seen. Not as a tool. Not as a lowborn upstart. But as himself.

From that moment, curiosity sprouted within Hugo’s heart. Over the years, that curiosity blossomed into devotion. And devotion, quietly ripened into a love he could never dare confess.

To harbor a one-sided love for a man so radiant, so far beyond his reach—and the Crown Prince of Aeskar, whom he had sworn to protect with his life, Hugo knew he deserved to be beheaded for such imprudent desire.

Especially now, when the Crown Prince was soon to be wed to another.

nyx's footnotes ── .✦
